rulings.Case Title: KIM KONAMI VS. ARYAN DAVANI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT CAROL YEE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise at to each cause of action as to the moving defendant. Additionally, Plaintiff shall allege facts in support of each element of conspiracy claim.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KIM KONAMI VS. ARYAN DAVANI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT CAROL YEE's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts in support of claims for attorney's fees, exemplary and punitive damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NIKOLAOS ARGYRAKIS VS. LEEANN BORAGNO LEEPER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs LEEANN LEEPER, CHRISTOPHER BORAGNO, and ANGELINA LEEPER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to December 15, 2017 per stipulation and order.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEN PETROSYAN VS. AURORA MARTINEZ SANGIL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT SANTIAGO SANGIL's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend as to allegations and prayer for damages. Daily damages pre-dating the expiration of the operative notice are not recoverable in UD action. Further, Plaintiff indicated in opposition that it is waiving it's right to seek any damages in this case (pre- and post-expiration of the Notice). Defendant to file answer within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff to prepare order. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to do so will result in motion being granted as unopposed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCOIS VARNAY VS. STEVEN RAPPORT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT STEVEN RAPPORT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile inconsistent allegations that the fixed term lease expired and that the option was exercised. See opposition 4:4-19. = (501/REQ)
